description_long: This object depicts a stylized stone tomb or grave set on a circular cobblestone platform with a raised wooden border. The central feature is a large, rounded stone mound with a dark entrance, partially blocked by a large, round stone slab that appears to have been rolled aside. Atop the mound are three wooden crosses, arranged in a row, and encircled by a large crown of thorns made from twisted branches. The cobblestone base is bordered by a thick, dark wooden ring, giving the scene a sense of enclosure. The overall appearance evokes imagery associated with Christian iconography, particularly the site of the crucifixion and resurrection.
description: A stone tomb with a rolled-away stone, three wooden crosses, and a crown of thorns atop a cobblestone platform with a wooden border.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tomb entrance, the rolled-away stone, three crosses, and the crown of thorns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the crown of thorns and the rolled-away stone positioned to the left of the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stone mound and the three crosses, with no visible entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the crown of thorns and the rolled-away stone now on the right, with the entrance not visible.
